name: Zhejiang Damon Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Damon Technology Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells logistics sorting equipment. The company offers box, pallet, sorting, and vertical conveyors; high speed palletizing systems; and intelligent storage picking systems. Its products are used in smart manufacturing, e-commerce, logistics, clothing, medicine, tobacco, retail, and other fields. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Shanghai, China.
